name: Canning Hot Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Split and remove seeds, veins, and stems from hot peppers.
2. Heat extra virgin olive oil in a saucepan to 300 degrees.
3. Carefully add the hot peppers to the jar, leaving ½ inch of headroom.
4. Using a pointed knife, make small holes around the peppers to allow for proper filling.
5. Slowly pour the hot oil into the holes, filling the jar about ¼ inch from the top.
6. Wipe the jar's top and sides with a paper towel and secure the lid tightly.
No further processing is required. The jarred product will be shelf-stable (check for the requisite sealed lid). Ensure at least the lid is sterilized; the hot oil will also help sterilize the jar and peppers.
